# Colophon {.unnumbered}

This book was produced with [Quarto](https://quarto.org).
Its examples use R 4.4 or later, the `zzcollab` framework,
Docker, and `renv`, each introduced in the chapter that
first requires it.

Fittingly for its subject, the book is built as a Quarto
project: the sources render to HTML and PDF with `quarto
render`, and wherever the book presents a computed figure
or table, that result is generated at build time from the
code shown beside it, so the printed output and the code
that produced it cannot drift apart. Pinning the book's
own environment to the standard the later chapters
develop, a lockfile and a container, is planned rather than
complete; the book will disclose its own reproducibility
level here, honestly, as it reaches each rung.

Last rendered: see the build timestamp on the homepage.
